definitions.purpose: To start and identify an interchange of zero or more functional groups and interchange-related control segments

fields.fieldDescription: Code identifying the type of information in the Authorization Information
Information used for additional identification or authorization of the interchange sender or the data in the interchange
Code identifying the type of information in the Security Information
This is used for identifying the security information about the interchange sender or the data in the interchange
Code indicating the system/method of code structure used to designate the sender or receiver ID element being qualified
Identification code published by the sender for other parties to use as the receiver ID to route data to them
Code indicating the system/method of code structure used to designate the sender or receiver ID element being qualified
Identification code published by the receiver of the data
Date of the interchange (YYMMDD)
Time of the interchange
Code to identify the agency responsible for the control standard used by the message
Code specifying the version number of the interchange control segments
A control number assigned by the interchange sender
Code indicating sender's request for an interchange acknowledgment
Code indicating whether data enclosed by this interchange envelope is test, production or information
The component data element separator is a delimiter and not a data element

definitions.purpose: To indicate the beginning of a functional group and to provide control information

fields.fieldDescription: Code identifying a group of application related transaction sets
Code identifying party sending transmission; codes agreed to by trading partners
Code identifying party receiving transmission; codes agreed to by trading partners
Date expressed as CCYYMMDD
Time expressed in 24-hour clock time (HHMM, HHMMSS, etc.)
Assigned number originated and maintained by the sender
Code identifying the issuer of the standard
Code indicating the version, release, and industry identifier of the EDI Standard being used

definitions.purpose: To indicate the start of a transaction set and to assign a control number

fields.fieldDescription: Code identifying a Transaction Set (210)
Identifying control number that must be unique within the transaction set functional group

definitions.purpose: To transmit basic data relating to the carrier's invoice

fields.fieldDescription: Code specifying the type of shipment
Identifying number assigned by issuer
Identification number assigned to the shipment by the shipper that uniquely identifies the shipment from origin to ultimate destination
Code identifying payment terms for transportation charges
A carrier-assigned number used to identify the shipment
Date expressed as CCYYMMDD
Total charges to be paid by the receiver of this transaction set
Code indicating that the transaction set contains information which corrects previous information
Date for delivery of cargo to final consignee
Code specifying type of date or time
Code identifying the Standard Carrier Alpha Code

definitions.purpose: To specify the currency being used in the transaction set

fields.fieldDescription: Code specifying the Standard ISO currency code
Value to be used as a multiplier conversion factor
Currency Code
Currency Code

definitions.purpose: To specify instructions in this business relationship or a reference number

fields.fieldDescription: Reference information as defined for a particular Transaction Set
Code identifying the Reference Identification
A free-form description to clarify the related data elements

definitions.purpose: To specify pertinent dates and times

fields.fieldDescription: Code specifying type of date
Date (CCYYMMDD)
Code specifying the reported time
Time expressed in 24-hour clock time as follows: HHMM, HHMMSS, or HHMMSSD
Code identifying an organizational entity
Free-form name
Code specifying the system/method of code structure

This ID is the Bill-To code of the customer. It should be the unique ID/code of a customer within the carrier. Owlery use this to route the invoice to the correct customer account. The carrier should decide the ID best suited within their system and email support@owlery.ai and integrations@owlery.ai to set up the code in Owlery.
